text:
Nebaska (ネバスカ, Nebasuka) is where an interview with Leol took place. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 224 

Overview

Nebaska is a place (probably a city) that was featured in a newscast that involved an interview between an independent news reporter and former Squadron Leader Leol. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

A news report about an interview between the "Lion-man of Nebaska" and an independent news reporter airs on TV. It's disclosed that the reporter patiently listens to the 'Lion-man's' underdeveloped theory of an imperial rule until she finally asks if he could prove to her that he is not fake. To prove himself he kills the news reporter by biting off her upper body in a single attempt. This incident proves that the monsters are real and not people in costumes. 

Trivia

The name of the place is transliterated as Nevaska in Crunchyroll's version/translation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 96 (2011) 
Its name might be derived from the U.S. state of Nebraska.
